---
name: Daily Event Logging API Checklist
about: Ensure changes align with specs/001-event-log-api before merging
labels: implementation
---

- [ ] Reviewed spec + plan updates in `specs/001-event-log-api/`
- [ ] Completed relevant tasks in `specs/001-event-log-api/tasks.md`
- [ ] Re-validated `specs/001-event-log-api/checklists/requirements.md`
- [ ] Ran `./mvnw test` inside `event-log-api/`
- [ ] Verified console log format matches `specs/001-event-log-api/contracts/events-api.md`
